title: Electrical Apprenticeship Program
description: Join our team and learn residential and commercial electrical installation. Hands-on training with experienced electricians on real projects across Greater Accra.
requirements: Basic literacy, willingness to learn, safety-conscious attitude. Prior technical education is a plus but not required.

title: Fashion Design Apprenticeship
description: Learn the art of Ghanaian fashion design including kente-inspired garments, pattern making, and modern sewing techniques in Kumasi's fashion district.
requirements: Creative mindset, basic sewing interest, commitment to 6-month program.

title: Carpentry Workshop Trainee
description: Golden Craft Ltd is offering apprenticeship positions in modern carpentry and furniture making. Work with master craftsmen on commercial and residential projects.
requirements: Minimum JHS certificate, physical fitness, team player.

title: Plumbing Skills Training
description: Comprehensive plumbing apprenticeship covering pipe fitting, drainage systems, and water heater installation.
requirements: Reliable, punctual, willing to work on-site.
